seoTitle: Depot Beach vs Deua — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Depot Beach and Deua. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Depot Beach vs Deua: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Depot Beach and Deua.
heading: Depot Beach vs Deua — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Depot Beach, New South Wales and Deua, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Deua has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Depot Beach (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Depot Beach or Deua safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Depot Beach has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Deua scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Depot Beach scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Deua scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Depot Beach or Deua?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Deua has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
